parsed.production_notes: The video is a screencast of a mobile application featuring a 3D animated avatar. The avatar's movements and lip-syncing suggest it is procedurally or AI-generated within the app's engine.

characters.appearance: Young male, 3D animated cartoon style. Fair complexion, messy dark hair, large expressive eyes, thick eyebrows.

panels.panel_visual_description: A grid of square portrait images featuring a 3D animated young man in various poses and expressions. The portraits show him looking angry, surprised, and distressed. The background is a plain light color.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile phone screen recording showing a grid of different conversational scenarios in an app. The user scrolls down and taps on a scenario titled 'Let's break up', which transitions to a detail page before starting the conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: 스픽에 비주얼 모드가 새로 생겼다는데 대비하면 좋을 상황들부터 도파민 상황까지 엄청 다양하거든요? [I heard Speak has a new visual mode, and it has a huge variety of situations, from ones you should prepare for to dopamine-inducing ones.]
Unknown speaker says: 주제부터 일단 재밌어보이는데 [The topic looks fun already.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Community Topics. 트렌딩. 신규. 탑 차트 - 일간. 무서운 입국 심사관. 체크인 시작합니다! YTN뉴스 따라말하기. 이별을 하세요. 나만의 시나리오 만들기. 스픽에 비주얼 모드가 새로 생겼다는데 대비하면 좋을 상황들부터 도파민 상황까지 엄청 다양하거든요? 주제부터 일단 재밌어보이는데. 대화 시작.

scenes.setting: A park in autumn, daytime, warm lighting, fallen leaves.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young man stands in a park setting with autumn trees and fallen leaves. He has a distressed expression, with his eyebrows furrowed and one hand raised in a pleading gesture. The lighting is warm and soft, suggesting late afternoon.

scenes.visual_description: The app interface shows the 3D avatar in a park setting. Text bubbles appear at the top as the avatar speaks, and a microphone button is at the bottom. The avatar gestures and changes facial expressions as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I know this is hard, but why do you want to break up? Have I done something wrong? [I know this is hard, but why do you want to break up? Have I done something wrong?]
Unknown speaker says: 실제로 상황이 눈 앞에 보이니까 엄청 몰입하게 되는거 있죠? [Since the situation is right in front of my eyes, I get really immersed in it, you know?]
Unknown speaker says: 저도 모르게 영어로 말하고 있더라구요 [I found myself speaking in English without realizing it.]
Unknown speaker says: 진짜 가성비 어학연수 [Truly a cost-effective language study abroad.]
Character A says: I want you to feel happy too. Can I do something to help you feel free? [I want you to feel happy too. Can I do something to help you feel free?]
scenes.on_screen_text: I know this is hard, but why do you want to break up? Have I done something wrong? 실제로 상황이 눈 앞에 보이니까 엄청 몰입하게 되는거 있죠? 힌트. I need some time to think about us. 영어로 말하고 있더라구요. 진짜 가성비 어학연수. I want you to feel happy too. Can I do something to help you feel free?

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, vibrant blue background with no other visual elements.

scenes.visual_description: A solid blue end card with the white 'Speak' logo in the center. Below the logo are app store download buttons. Text appears above the logo.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: 영어 스피킹은 스픽 [English speaking is Speak.]
scenes.on_screen_text: 영어 스피킹은 Speak. 지금 스픽 다운받고 영어 공부 시작하기. App Store. Google Play.
